alarm_groups.name: oomkill_log_analysis
alarm_groups.comment: Analysis for OOMKilled pods: fetches previous logs from containers that were terminated due to out-of-memory
alarm_titles: Pods are restarting with OOMKilled in MAX namespace

alarm_groups.name: deployment_health_check
alarm_groups.comment: Mitigation for unhealthy deployments: checks deployment health, inspects pods in CrashLoopBackOff/ImagePullBackOff, captures previous logs, and restarts affected pods
alarm_titles: One or more replica is not healthy in the deployment

alarm_groups.name: restarting_pod_analysis
alarm_groups.comment: Analysis for Restarting pods: fetches previous logs from containers that were restarted
alarm_titles: Pods are restarting in MAX namespace

alarm_groups.name: daemonset_health_check
alarm_groups.comment: Mitigation for unhealthy daemonsets: checks daemonset health, inspects pods in CrashLoopBackOff/ImagePullBackOff, captures previous logs, and restarts affected pods
alarm_titles: One or more replica is not healthy in the daemonset

alarm_groups.name: cluster_pod_recovery
alarm_groups.comment: Cluster-wide pod remediation: inspects all namespaces for pods stuck in CrashLoopBackOff/ImagePullBackOff/Init states, captures diagnostics, and restarts each pod once
alarm_titles: One or more pod is down in the cluster

alarm_groups.name: evicted_pod_cleanup
alarm_groups.comment: Removes evicted pods from every namespace to free up capacity when evictions exceed 5% of the cluster
alarm_titles: More than 5 percent of the pods are evicted in the cluster

alarm_groups.name: resource_usage_cleanup
alarm_groups.comment: Mitigation for critical resource usage alarms: clears failed pods across all namespaces to reclaim resources
